TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Natauran U niyaru' nu maku, u niyaru' nu maku i tira i Natauran saetip u pisakeruan nu binauran, sawalisa u pidatengan nu niyam. Bangcal ku niyaru' nu maku ,sakaulahan nu tamtamdaw anu cacay ku radiw maemin tu a makeru kami salipahak saan amaemin. I ayaw hen u Natauran hanana a niyaru' adihay ku taur'hananay a kilang tarakaw kira kilang u kawas nu i tiniay u midiputay tina niyaru'an . Anini hantu awaay tu kira sasakeru'an nu binaula mala pangiruantu masumad tu amin. U pidatengan nu niyam u icibatu awaay a mamelaw ku ayawway a saka hululan nu niyam. Suwalsa ku matuasay yu karipunan henay adihay kira tau'r, u papah nira adi;di' malubic ku baru'.
S.PHON: natao~u~uran o~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u mako~u~u, o~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u mako~u~u i tira i natao~u~uran saətip o~u~u pisakəro~u~uan no~u~u b~b~vinao~u~uran, sawaɾisa o~u~u piɬ~ɮatəŋan no~u~u nijam. b~b~vaŋʦaɾ ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u mako~u~u ,sakao~u~uɾaħan no~u~u tamtamɬ~ɮaw ano~u~u ʦaʦaj ko~u~u raɬ~ɮiw maəmin to~u~u a makəro~u~u kami saɾipaħak saan amaəmin. i ajaw ħən o~u~u natao~u~uran ħanana a nijaro~u~uʡ aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u tao~u~urʡħananaj a kiɾaŋ tarakaw kira kiɾaŋ o~u~u kawas no~u~u i tiniaj o~u~u miɬ~ɮipo~u~utaj tina nijaro~u~uʡan . anini ħanto~u~u awaaj to~u~u kira sasakəro~u~uʡan no~u~u b~b~vinao~u~uɾa maɾa paŋiro~u~uanto~u~u maso~u~umaɬ~ɮ to~u~u amin. o~u~u piɬ~ɮatəŋan no~u~u nijam o~u~u iʦib~b~vato~u~u awaaj a maməɾaw ko~u~u ajawwaj a saka ħo~u~uɾo~u~uɾan no~u~u nijam. so~u~uwaɾsa ko~u~u mato~u~uasaj jo~u~u karipo~u~unan ħənaj aɬ~ɮiħaj kira tao~u~uʡr, o~u~u papaħ nira aɬ~ɮi;ɬ~ɮiʡ maɾo~u~ub~b~viʦ ko~u~u b~b~varo~u~uʡ.
S.FORM: Natauran U niyaru' nu maku, u niyaru' nu maku i tira i Natauran saetip u pisakeruan nu binauran, sawalisa u pidatengan nu niyam. Bangcal ku niyaru' nu maku ,sakaulahan nu tamtamdaw anu cacay ku radiw maemin tu a makeru kami salipahak saan amaemin. I ayaw hen u Natauran hanana a niyaru' adihay ku taur'hananay a kilang tarakaw kira kilang u kawas nu i tiniay u midiputay tina niyaru'an . Anini hantu awaay tu kira sasakeru'an nu binaula mala pangiruantu masumad tu amin. U pidatengan nu niyam u icibatu awaay a mamelaw ku ayawway a saka hululan nu niyam. Suwalsa ku matuasay yu karipunan henay adihay kira tau'r, u papah nira adi;di' malubic ku baru'.
S.PHON: natao~u~uran o~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u mako~u~u, o~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u mako~u~u i tira i natao~u~uran saətip o~u~u pisakəro~u~uan no~u~u b~b~vinao~u~uran, sawaɾisa o~u~u piɬ~ɮatəŋan no~u~u nijam. b~b~vaŋʦaɾ ko~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u mako~u~u ,sakao~u~uɾaħan no~u~u tamtamɬ~ɮaw ano~u~u ʦaʦaj ko~u~u raɬ~ɮiw maəmin to~u~u a makəro~u~u kami saɾipaħak saan amaəmin. i ajaw ħən o~u~u natao~u~uran ħanana a nijaro~u~uʡ aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u tao~u~urʡħananaj a kiɾaŋ tarakaw kira kiɾaŋ o~u~u kawas no~u~u i tiniaj o~u~u miɬ~ɮipo~u~utaj tina nijaro~u~uʡan . anini ħanto~u~u awaaj to~u~u kira sasakəro~u~uʡan no~u~u b~b~vinao~u~uɾa maɾa paŋiro~u~uanto~u~u maso~u~umaɬ~ɮ to~u~u amin. o~u~u piɬ~ɮatəŋan no~u~u nijam o~u~u iʦib~b~vato~u~u awaaj a maməɾaw ko~u~u ajawwaj a saka ħo~u~uɾo~u~uɾan no~u~u nijam. so~u~uwaɾsa ko~u~u mato~u~uasaj jo~u~u karipo~u~unan ħənaj aɬ~ɮiħaj kira tao~u~uʡr, o~u~u papaħ nira aɬ~ɮi;ɬ~ɮiʡ maɾo~u~ub~b~viʦ ko~u~u b~b~varo~u~uʡ.
